results.description: The weekend of 11-12 July 2026 splashed out with a host of top-level sports events, ranging from an England World Cup Quarter Final to the Wimbledon Finals. Most significant of all, however, was the Scorpion Class Open Meeting at Sidmouth Sailing Club.
